title: Doba trvání fáze ve status
goal: mini status shows how long each finished phase took, computed from startedAt/completedAt, as a compact '(took 3m)' suffix on the phase line; phases without both timestamps show nothing. Covered by unit tests on the duration formatter.

steps.title: Duration formatter + helper
steps.detail: In status.ts add pure formatDuration(ms) (e.g. 45s / 3m / 2h 5m / 1d 2h, largest two units) and phaseDuration(phase) returning ms from startedAt..completedAt or null; unit tests over the ranges and the null cases.

steps.title: Show duration in the phase line
steps.detail: In printPhase append a dim '(took <dur>)' when phaseDuration is non-null; verified via a render test / direct call.

steps.title: CHANGELOG
steps.detail: Add an English CHANGELOG entry under Unreleased for the phase-duration display.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 104: Doba trvání fáze ve status
